top5_priority: RE-201 (high, validated): stale recovery failure leaves total_exposure unreduced - same mechanism as INC-2026-0526-001, production path, no auto-correction
DE-201 (high, validated): WARMUP_BARS=2000 insufficient for ema_800, live strategy ATLAS-2026-0508-069 producing parity drift now
DM-204 (high, validated): MetricsCollector not injected in UnifiedRunner, all Prometheus safety alerts (KillSwitch/CB/PTRC) permanently dead in production
QA-201 (medium, downgraded from high): var_95/cvar_95 from 500pt sampled curve causes 85.3pct false weakness_detector fires, systematic mis-feedback
QT-204 (medium, adoption upgraded to must_fix): multi-slot claimed_trade_ids INC R2 fix has no integration test, regression undetectable on refactor

validations.rationale: Exception swallowing at context_builder.py:548 confirmed, no logging. ATLAS feedback quality path only, not live trading execution. CLAUDE.md violation. Fix straightforward but not safety-critical. Medium confirmed.
GPU kernel probe returning False silently on unexpected exceptions. CPU fallback operates correctly. No production trading impact. Low confirmed.

type() in SANDBOX_BUILTINS enabling MRO traversal confirmed. Runtime test within finding shows actual RCE requires additional blocked attributes (__subclasses__ in FORBIDDEN_DUNDER_ATTRS). Defense-in-depth gap: future sandbox changes could open attack surface. Medium confirmed.
Missing type annotation on normalizer at runner.py:566. CLAUDE.md violation. No production impact. Low confirmed.
SANDBOX_BUILTINS as bare dict without type parameter. CLAUDE.md violation. No production impact. Low confirmed.
OOS exception in vectorbt_engine.py:998 logs warning (satisfies CLAUDE.md partially) but silently degrades to empty dict. Layer 1 passes with no OOS data. Not Gate-connected. Low appropriate.

DOWNGRADED high->medium. result_parser.py:334-374 computes var_95/cvar_95/tail_ratio/efficiency_ratio from 500-point sampled equity_curve confirmed. 85.3pct false-fire rate in weakness_detector (517/606) confirmed at weakness_detector.py:145. CRITICAL COUNTERPOINT: grep of scorer.py returns 0 matches for var_95 - NOT Gate-connected. Does not affect Tier1 or Tier2 pass/fail. Harm is indirect: systematic mis-feedback to fx-strategist wasting improvement budget. High requires production safety mechanism failure; this is evaluation quality degradation only. must_fix adoption because 85.3pct false fire rate makes weakness feedback systematically unreliable.

WFA_MIN_WALKS=10 causing 28.5pct wfa=None confirmed. EFFECTIVE_WEIGHT_FLOOR=0.70 (v6.0.1) caps inflation at 1.43x max - quant-analyst omits this mitigation but it does not eliminate the concern. 10 of 308 passed with wfa=None. Medium confirmed.

WFA PF as arithmetic mean of ratios (not pooled PF) confirmed at event_simulator.py:1614-1622. Genuine statistical error: mean(a/b) != sum(a)/sum(b). OOS/IS component weight 0.12 in Tier2. Single high-PF walk distorts average. Medium confirmed.
pain_index/ulcer_index/conditional_dd from 500-point sampled curve confirmed. Information metrics, not Gate-connected. Shares root cause with QA-201, fix together. Low confirmed.

consistency_score uses bar-count chunks not calendar months confirmed at event_simulator.py:1492-1506. Gate-connected (scorer.py:98,118-128,185-192) weight 0.15 but bias is systematic across all strategies so relative ranking is preserved. Naming misleading. Low confirmed.

restore_positions position_mismatch alert asymmetry confirmed at strategy_slot.py:1313-1322 vs runner.py:898-904. Fires for sibling strategy trades. Alert fatigue in multi-strategy deployments (6 USD/JPY, 8 EUR/JPY per memory). Does not affect trade adoption or exposure. Low confirmed.

Contaminated state.json edge case confirmed at runner.py:635-640 and strategy_slot.py:1414-1421,1714-1733. Precondition: INC-era state.json still present AND contaminated trade still OPEN. INC was 6 days ago (2026-05-20). If trades closed, precondition does not hold. Operational fix (state.json audit) resolves definitively. Low confirmed.
StrategyLifecycle FSM confirmed as dead code at lifecycle.py:19-50. No runtime instantiation in production path. LIVE_TRADING state missing from FSM. No safety impact. Low confirmed.

VALIDATED as high. Confirmed: strategy_slot.py:1668-1733 calls record_close ONLY when state==CLOSED (line 1675). Else branch (1714-1720) and exception branch (1721-1727) clear open_trade_id without calling record_close. Confirmed: risk_supervisor.py:675-694 - record_close is the only exposure subtraction mechanism. Confirmed: test_runner_periodic_reconcile.py:86 uses AsyncMock for _recover_stale_trade_pnl, exposure non-subtraction on failure is untested. Mechanistically identical to INC-2026-0526-001: OANDA open=0, internal exposure remains, live orders rejected at 100000 unit cap. Restoration path (R1/R2) fixed but in-session stale recovery path has same bug. High confirmed.

DOWNGRADED medium->low. Units/JPY mismatch in PTRC-Post exposure ratio confirmed at ptrc_post.py:146-165. However: grep of runner.py for ptrc_post and PostTradeRisk returns 0 matches. PTRC-Post is exclusively in coordinator.py and main.py (dev/FastAPI path only). In production UnifiedRunner, PTRC-Post never executes. A bug in code that never runs in production cannot be medium severity. The finding itself acknowledges this mitigation but assigns medium anyway - severity inflation error. Low (tech-debt) is appropriate.

FX rate staleness in currency_converter.py:159-181 confirmed. Cross rates cached without TTL, re-seeded only at heartbeat intervals. Different from RE-001 (static fixed rate) - here rate is at worst a few minutes stale during normal operation. Fail-safe (None->REJECT) works only when NO rate exists, not when stale rate exists. Real production path, real risk, bounded magnitude. Medium confirmed.
CircuitBreaker state not guarded by __setattr__ like KillSwitch confirmed. CB has cooldown self-reset by design. Theoretical risk only. Low confirmed.
FillProcessor idempotency key degrading to (order_id, order_id) when broker_fill_id absent. OANDA market orders typically full fills. Low confirmed.

VALIDATED as high. Confirmed: runner.py:74 WARMUP_BARS=2000 fixed constant. live_store.py:40-49 BUFFER_SAFETY_FACTOR=50, k>=13 needed for 1e-10 convergence. strategy.py:82 for ATLAS-2026-0508-069 registers ema_800. For span=800, warmup=2000 gives k=2.5, residual exp(-5)=6.7e-3 (0.67pct of price). live_store.py:76-89 shows MAX_REGISTRABLE_PERIOD raised to 1000 for this strategy but warmup not updated. Signal divergence affects strategy.py:172-173 direction decisions (uptrend = ema_fast > ema_slow). Parity test cannot detect this (gives full data to both sides). State.json confirms active live strategy. High confirmed.

poll_latest returning only most recent candle when multiple bars formed confirmed at data_provider.py:155-184. For H1/H4 with 60s polling, delay must exceed bar period (60-240 min) to lose a bar. For M15, a single OANDA timeout (>15 min) loses a bar permanently. CandleFetcher gap-handling not used in UnifiedRunner. Medium appropriate: conditional on network conditions.
forward_test.py WARMUP_BARS=200 confirmed. Forward test is not live execution path. Low appropriate. Same root cause as DE-201, fix together.

E2E signal-to-fill test with conditional assertion (if fills_completed > 0:) confirmed at test_signal_flow.py:287-292. Produces green even when fill/position path is untested. Real testing gap. Medium confirmed.

PTRC fixture using StaticConverter causes RE-001 fail-safe before PTRC business logic reached, masking correctness behind xfail. Confirmed at test_atlas_top3_strategies.py:229-230. Fix: MockCurrencyConverter. Medium confirmed.
Exception detail discarded in test_no_crash_with_data error handler. Test still fails correctly. Low confirmed.

ADOPTION LEVEL UPGRADED to must_fix (severity remains medium). Multi-slot claimed_trade_ids sharing loop at runner.py:488-497 is INC-2026-0526-001 R2 fix. Only coverage is StrategySlot unit level with mocked args - no integration test for runner._restore_all_positions() across multiple real slots. If refactor splits the loop, unit test passes but INC re-occurs. INC caused 6 days zero live orders and 887 JPY loss. Regression protection must be at integration level.
STRICT_SKIP=1 not enabled by default in CI. Static test_no_existence_skip.py catches many patterns. Low appropriate.

DOWNGRADED medium->low. Finding claims redis_url non-empty default causes Redis prober to always register. However runner.py:380-384 explicitly avoids Redis prober with comment explaining InMemoryEventBus makes it unnecessary in UnifiedRunner. Production path already handles this correctly. Issue only affects main.py (dev/staging). Severity inflation error by original agent.
Real email address hardcoded in settings.py:211-212 and .env.example. PII in committed code. Should be fixed. Low confirmed.
smtp_password as plain str instead of SecretStr at settings.py:248. Risk only on model_dump() exposure. Low confirmed.

VALIDATED as high. Confirmed: grep of runner.py for set_metrics_collector returns 0 matches. Confirmed: runner.py:370-404 initialize() has no MetricsCollector injection. Confirmed: main.py:107-121 dev path injects correctly for 7 modules. Production path (UnifiedRunner via run_unified.py) never increments fx_kill_switch_triggered_total, fx_circuit_breaker_triggered_total, fx_ptrc_reject_total. alerting_rules.yml FxKillSwitchTriggered, FxCircuitBreakerTriggered, FxPtrcRejectSpike are permanently silent in production. A kill switch trigger generates no Prometheus alert. High confirmed.
Missing alert rules for fx_signal_silence_sec, fx_feature_store_compute_errors_total, fx_backfill_failures_total, fx_live_eligible_key_missing_total. Low confirmed.
Missing runbook file position_reconciler_mismatch.md referenced by alerting_rules.yml:127 and email_notifier.py:655. Low confirmed.

DOWNGRADED AND PARTIALLY REJECTED. Dashboard health display hides component-level anomalies confirmed at app.py:136-139. However: (1) Dashboard is Streamlit monitoring UI, not a safety mechanism. (2) Operators receive email alerts for critical events regardless of dashboard state. (3) State-file mode is an architectural constraint (UnifiedRunner does not run FastAPI). Information gap is real but production impact is observability UX only, not safety. Downgraded to low.

REJECTED as actionable finding. metrics.py kind label comment missing 3 INC-added kinds (position_mismatch, live_anomaly, position_reconcile_mismatch). Comment drift only - counter increments work correctly, Grafana can filter any kind value regardless of comment. Documentation note only, not a finding requiring priority treatment.
